islands.name: Credit Ruins
islands.description: 2010s cinematic realism — overgrown temples of credit history. Recover score artifacts, dodge The Collector, and rebuild trust with lenders.

learning_objectives: Understand how credit scores are calculated
Learn responsible borrowing and debt management
Compare loan types: secured vs unsecured, fixed vs variable
provenance.originality_notes: Theme: ruined jungle temples as metaphors for damaged credit (not a bank sim). Verb: recover artifacts on a Fortune Party board with rival captains. Structure: chance + skill minigames teaching credit repair.

areas.name: Ruined Gate
areas.description: Mossy pillars and a cracked credit obelisk. Your compass points deeper.

areas.name: Score Vault
areas.description: Stone tablets etched with payment histories. Touch them carefully.

areas.name: Debt Canyon
areas.description: Echoes of interest. The Collector patrols these ledges.

items.name: Credit Shard
items.description: A fragment of on-time payment history.

quests.title: First Recovery
quests.description: Talk to the Archivist and clear a credit minigame on the party board.

nodes.speaker: Cleo the Archivist
nodes.text: These ruins remember every late payment. Recover shards, keep your Emergency Ledger ready, and never ignore The Collector.

nodes.speaker: Cleo the Archivist
nodes.text: Roll the Fortune Party board. Minigames here teach scores, APR, and rebuilding trust — painted in cinematic ruin light.

nodes.speaker: Cleo the Archivist
nodes.text: Watch your pouch. Chance spaces cut deeper here.

minigames.name: Credit Inbox
minigames.description: Diegetic messages about loans, APR, and late fees — choose the path that rebuilds score.

minigames.name: Debt Loadout
minigames.description: Balance payments across debts before interest compounds in the canyon.

minigames.name: Score Scanner
minigames.description: Read credit signals in the ruins — on-time history vs utilization spikes.
